title: ACES Scenario Pack — Release Metadata (v0)
description: Release metadata for a pack: the release version, the schema versions it publishes, the compatibility impact, and migration notes. Follows the versioning and release policy in docs/versioning.md.

packId.description: Pack this release record applies to.

schemaVersions.description: Schema families published in this release and their versions.

notes.description: What changed and why, in compatibility terms.

migrationNotes.description: Migration story for any breaking change.
